summary: Human Gate for formal M5 passage
acceptance_criteria: Formal M5 passage is recorded only after explicit Human Gate approval and after all required M5 evidence tasks are accepted.

Evidence covers repeatable 2-4 hour playable vertical slice, multi-year AI run without rescue, Web/Windows distributable proof, player research, performance gate, and the manual node battle decision outcome.
The gate distinguishes PASS, PASS_WITH_LIMITS, BLOCKED, and follow-up decisions without fabricating reviewer acceptance or hiding process limits.

The task does not implement product code, create release artifacts, decide commercial/branding/store presence, add telemetry/server/multiplayer/arbitrary-code mods, or change frozen product/platform/core architecture decisions.
Autonomous Goal Mode must stop here unless the human approval is explicit and recorded.
required_tests: node -e JSON validation for all M5 evidence tasks, dependency statuses, handoffs, and Human Gate record
Human Gate approval record includes explicit approval text, date, actor, M5 result, limits, and follow-up routing.
notes: This is the formal M5 Human Gate and must not be auto-passed by a reviewer handoff or CI result.
Do not create docs/GATE-M5.md, MANIFEST.md, SHA256SUMS.txt, VALIDATION_REPORT.md, release packages, or commercial/branding artifacts unless a later explicitly authorized gate task allows them.
If any evidence is incomplete, record BLOCKED or PASS_WITH_LIMITS; do not mark M5 passed.
